creator: stievenard.david@gmail.com
text:
Dear port maintainer(s),

I just installed the last version of glpi and it works quite well ;) thanks to you guys !


I suggest that the 2 options

     IMAP=off: IMAP support
     LDAP=off: LDAP protocol support

to be on ny default.

As this is an inventory/ticket software, be able to read mails to generate tickets and use ldap to identify users seems extremely useful by default, what do you think ?

thanks
Dasti
